final_prompt.prompt:
Create a cinematic still of a cyberpunk future cityscape at night with towering skyscrapers, neon lights, and flying cars.

Style/medium: cinematic concept art, Blade Runner-inspired neo-noir aesthetic, photorealistic
Composition: wide establishing shot from street level looking up, 24mm lens, deep depth of field
Subject: dense cluster of futuristic megastructures with layered architecture, holographic billboards, flying vehicles weaving between towers
Scene/backdrop: rain-soaked urban canyon, wet streets with puddles reflecting neon glow, perpetual night, polluted atmosphere
Lighting/mood: harsh neon light from signage and windows, dramatic rim lighting, moody and dystopian
Color palette: dominant electric blue and violet neon, warm orange and pink accent lights, deep shadows in black
Materials/textures: wet asphalt with mirror-like reflections, metal and concrete surfaces, rain droplets, glass facades
Avoid: clean utopian aesthetic, daytime lighting, cheerful atmosphere, over-saturated colors, 8K stuffer aesthetic
